highlights: [2026-05-27 18:52] Pratik Sir: can just tell me my inter net speed

[2026-05-27 18:52] IP Prime: Seedhe internet speed check karne ka tool abhi nahi hai, Pratik Sir. Lekin aapko results dekhne ke liye, main browser mein speedtest.net khol sakta hoon. Kya main aage badhun?
[2026-05-27 18:56] IP Prime: Kahiye Pratik Sir! Kaise hain aap? Kya help karoon?
[2026-05-27 18:56] Pratik Sir: प्राइम शट डाउन पी थी

[2026-05-27 18:57] IP Prime: Pratik Sir, main aapka PC tabhi 'shutdown' kar sakta hoon jab aap exact phrase "go to sleep" kahenge. Kya aap confirm karna chahte hain?
[2026-05-27 18:57] Pratik Sir: shut shut dow n my P C and keep quiet.

[2026-05-27 18:57] IP Prime: Arey Pratik Sir, security reasons ki wajah se main aapka PC directly shutdown nahi kar sakta. Sirf "go to sleep" command se hi shutdown hota hai. Kya aap wahi bolna chahte hain?
